title: stelis humilis
intro: Stelis humilis is a plant species belonging to the orchid family, known for its delicate and small appearance. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis humilis are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, although more research is necessary to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Stelis humilis is often made into teas or infusions, which are then used to treat various ailments.
